About Us

Rooted in community, growing together.

Who We Are

Children Of Promise Christian Dayschool has been a trusted part of the Millstadt community since 1987, providing quality early childhood care and education to families across the region. We are conveniently located within 10 miles of Belleville, Dupo, and Cahokia Heights — and situated on 9 beautiful acres that give our children room to explore, play, and grow.

We are a DCFS licensed facility committed to the whole child — nurturing social, emotional, educational, and behavioral development from infancy through school age. Our dedicated staff brings warmth, experience, and a genuine love for children to everything they do.

Whether you're looking for infant care, a toddler program, pre-school, or before and afterschool care, we are here to support your family every step of the way.

Our Programs

🍼

Infant & Toddler

Nurturing care for children from birth through age three.

🧒

2-Year Olds

Dedicated program for 2-year olds focused on play-based learning and social development.

🎨

Pre-School

Developmentally appropriate learning for 3 and 4 year olds.

🏫

Before & Afterschool

Safe, enriching care before and after the school day, plus summer program.

Contact Us

If you are interested in inquiring about our center please fill out the Pre-Enrollment form or call us and we will be happy to answer any questions.
